scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/journal-search run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.build:prod: BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/journal-search run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
